name: Fettuccine Alla Panna
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
2. In a wide shallow serving bowl, combine the butter and cream.
3. Heat until the butter has melted.
4. Stir in two-thirds of the Parmesan cheese.
5. When the pasta is cooked al dente, toss it with the sauce.
6. Sprinkle the remaining Parmesan cheese over the top.
Delicious. FROM: MONICA DEBIASE (PKFR67A)
